mechanism_summary: I2S (cmplog) records each per-character comparand byte during execution and substitutes the exact 6-byte xmlns\0 sequence into the matching input offset, bypassing the dead zone of VP's Hamming-prefix gradient for a 6-way single-byte equality chain.
one_line: I2S splices exact 6-byte xmlns\0 that VP Hamming gradient cannot synthesize

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace splices the logged multibyte-lead-byte comparands from the high-bit check CMPs into the cursor input position, constructing the 0xf5/0xff-lead sequence that decodes to an out-of-IS_CHAR-range codepoint that value_profile's distance feedback cannot reliably target.
one_line: I2S constructs invalid multibyte lead sequence to fail IS_CHAR check

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace splices logged per-byte tag and namespace literal comparands from xmlParseStartTag2/xmlParseQName directly into input bytes, assembling the exact xmlns-bearing start tag and '/>' close that value_profile's gradient alone cannot synthesize.
one_line: I2S assembles exact xmlns start-tag and empty-element close bytes
